site.title: Miriam González
site.subtitle: Searching for a Precision Oncology with AI

hero.tagline: One patient. A unique tumor. A real chance.
hero.title: Miriam has metastatic breast cancer and standard medicine has no answers for her case.
hero.subtitle: Her tumor doesn't respond to any standard treatment. Finding the right one requires tests that public healthcare won't fund. And time cannot wait.

gofundme.title: Why do we need your help?
gofundme.subtitle: Miriam needs to fund a precision diagnostic strategy that public healthcare doesn't cover. Every contribution brings her case closer to an answer — and could set a precedent for other patients with tumours outside clinical guidelines.
gofundme.what_intro: The money covers the needs of the case as they emerge — not just one test, but everything involved in finding the right treatment for a tumour with no established protocol.
what_items: Bone re-biopsy with advanced genomic panel
Functional immunohistochemistry tests to identify therapeutic targets
Consultations and second opinions with international specialists
Clinical documentation for access to trials and compassionate use programmes
Any additional test that arises throughout the process
gofundme.why_title: Why isn't this covered by public healthcare?
gofundme.why_text: Current clinical guidelines classify this tumour as "standard HR+", but its real biology — with 80% neuroendocrine differentiation and FGFR1 ×13 amplification — needs precision tests that are not included in the protocol. Without them, the treatment is insufficient for what Miriam actually has.
gofundme.transparency_text: Every expense is publicly documented. We request quotes from international reference centers and share them with the community.

science.subtitle: An ultra-rare molecular profile that challenges current clinical guidelines

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: If you're an oncology professional, researcher, journalist or simply want to help
contact.message: If you have relevant information about clinical trials, medical contacts, or you'd like to collaborate in any way, don't hesitate to reach out.

footer.disclaimer: This site is an informational resource maintained by the patient's support team. It does not replace professional medical advice.
footer.made_with: Made with care, science, and a lot of AI.
